title: [TaCZ]  Curios For Ammo Box
description: Allows tacz ammo box to be placed in curios slots
body:
# \[TaCZ\] Curios For Ammo Boxes

**Never run out of bullets on the go!**  
The Curios for Ammo Box lets you carry your ammunition in a Curios slot, freeing up your inventory while keeping every round within reach.

Streamline your loadout, reload faster, and stay battle-ready at all times.  
Perfect for sharpshooters who want style, speed, and endless firepower at their side.
